message:
assets: Add project illustration for README

Add caut_illustration.png, a visual representation of the Coding Agent
Usage Tracker (caut) project for use in documentation and README.

This image provides a visual overview of the CLI tool's purpose:
monitoring LLM provider usage across multiple services (Codex, Claude,
Gemini, etc.) with both human-readable and machine-parseable output
formats.

Note: The macOS resource fork file (._caut_illustration.png) is
intentionally excluded as it is an ephemeral metadata file.
